title: Marikamba Temple, Sagara
tagline: Marikamba Temple, Sagara — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Marikamba Temple is located in Sagara in the Shimoga district in the Indian state of Karnataka.
overview.description: The Marikamba Temple is located in Sagara in the Shimoga district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It features the image of the goddess Marikamba Devi. The temple was built in the center of the city during the reign of Venkatappa Nayaka who ruled over Keladi and Ikkeri kingdom during the 16th century. Marikamba was the family deity of the Nayakas of Keladi.

topPlaces.name: Sagara, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Sagara is a city located in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is also a sub divisional and a taluk headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Ikkeri
topPlaces.description: Ikkeri (Kannada: [ikːeːri]) is a hamlet situated in Sagara taluk (township) about 6 km to the south of the town centre in Sagara. It is known for the Aghoreshvara Temple, dedicated to an avatar of Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Keladi
topPlaces.description: Keladi (Kannada: [keɭɐd̪i]) is a temple town in Sagara Taluk of the state of Karnataka in India. Keladi is located about 8 km from the town of Sagara.

topPlaces.name: Adaranthe
topPlaces.description: Adaranthe is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Sagara taluka of Shimoga district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Heggodu
topPlaces.description: Heggodu is a village located in the Sagar Taluk of Karnataka. It is a very important cultural and educational hub in South India, because of the organizations at this place.

topPlaces.name: Holebaagilu, Sagara
topPlaces.description: Holebaagilu is situated on the banks of the Sharavati River about 30 km (19 mi) from Sagar, Karnataka. Drivers have to take a diversion from B. H. Road towards Ikkeri Road to get there.

items.note: Sagara is a city located in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is also a sub divisional and a taluk headquarters.

Ikkeri (Kannada: [ikːeːri]) is a hamlet situated in Sagara taluk (township) about 6 km to the south of the town centre in Sagara. It is known for the Aghoreshvara Temple, dedicated to an avatar of Shiva.
Keladi (Kannada: [keɭɐd̪i]) is a temple town in Sagara Taluk of the state of Karnataka in India. Keladi is located about 8 km from the town of Sagara.
Adaranthe is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Sagara taluka of Shimoga district in Karnataka.
Heggodu is a village located in the Sagar Taluk of Karnataka. It is a very important cultural and educational hub in South India, because of the organizations at this place.
Holebaagilu is situated on the banks of the Sharavati River about 30 km (19 mi) from Sagar, Karnataka. Drivers have to take a diversion from B. H. Road towards Ikkeri Road to get there.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Marikamba Temple, Sagara?
faq.a: The best time to visit Marikamba Temple, Sagara is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Marikamba Temple, Sagara?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (133 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (131 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Marikamba Temple, Sagara?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Marikamba Temple, Sagara at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Marikamba Temple, Sagara?
faq.a: Stays in Marikamba Temple, Sagara start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Marikamba Temple, Sagara?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sagara, Karnataka, Ikkeri, Keladi, Adaranthe, Heggodu.
